title: Cut Stone for Cobble
description: Lets you convert Stone and Deepslate into their cobbled variants through the Stonecutter.
body:
This project will no longer be updated because it has been partially added to vanilla in 26.1. Anything missing in vanilla that is in this pack you'll have to do yourself.

This small datapack/mod lets you cut Stone and Deepslate in the Stonecutter to obtain their cobbled variants without having to mine them. Useful for people who use Silk Touch Pickaxes a lot, or even just for convenience!
